topic: Launchdeck 的 Skill、MCP 与 Claude/Codex Plugin 产品及技术架构
summary: Handoff assessment is ready-for-contract. The current Launchdeck repository is the locked implementation target; first release is one shared Kernel with backward-compatible CLI, low-risk local stdio MCP, one canonical Skill, and separately generated Codex/Claude Plugins. Hard unknowns and conflicts are zero; host elicitation and path-variable verification remain non-blocking soft unknowns.

turn_packet.user_goal: Launchdeck 的 Skill、MCP 与 Claude/Codex Plugin 产品及技术架构
turn_packet.current_decision_frame: Launchdeck 的 Skill、MCP 与 Claude/Codex Plugin 产品及技术架构
confirmed_decisions: Lock F:/github/launchdeck as the implementation target and current behavior source of truth.
Lock first release to low-risk local stdio MCP, existing configured projects, canonical Skill, and generated Codex/Claude Plugins.
Defer automatic adoption writes, medium-plus MCP risk, force-stop, risky clean/reset, remote MCP, hooks, UI, native binaries, and enterprise policy implementation.
turn_packet.current_recommendation: Draft one sp-specify requirement contract preserving the Kernel, safety, recovery, compatibility, packaging, and verification obligations.
